## Source: ghsa-malware (bf0d489a7752a6a939542f572991c2d753520f7358ea1c1f5dfd27c009376512)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (16f2aff274da86497ad8fe6322b501a1269cd37d3ad40e227f11126aa2da5413)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'mandrill-api-ruby' @ 6.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
